description: Synthetic application identifier.
synthetic_bias_role: None.
production_credit_model_note: Operational ID only; not a credit-risk predictor.

description: Active reporting jurisdiction for the simulated application.
synthetic_bias_role: Assigned to demonstrate cross-border rule switching.
production_credit_model_note: Use for governance routing, not credit approval.

description: Applicant age in years.
synthetic_bias_role: Age distribution is synthetic.
production_credit_model_note: Age may be legally restricted or require counsel review before production use.

description: Binned age label for portfolio review.
synthetic_bias_role: Derived from synthetic age.
production_credit_model_note: Governance reporting only; avoid in production scoring unless explicitly permitted.

description: Synthetic gender attribute for documentation realism.
synthetic_bias_role: Randomly assigned; not used in the model.
production_credit_model_note: Do not use in production credit scoring.

description: Synthetic protected-group proxy used for fairness monitoring.
synthetic_bias_role: Used to introduce a mild controlled disparity for monitoring demonstration.
production_credit_model_note: Fairness analysis only; do not use as a production credit model input.

description: Annual income in synthetic currency units.
synthetic_bias_role: Generated from a lognormal distribution.
production_credit_model_note: May be valid with affordability policy controls and data-quality validation.

description: Synthetic employment category.
synthetic_bias_role: Unemployment affects synthetic credit score, debt burden and default outcome.
production_credit_model_note: Review for fair-lending proxy risk and reason-code suitability.

description: Synthetic bureau-style credit score.
synthetic_bias_role: Protected-group proxy slightly lowers the generated score to create measurable disparity.
production_credit_model_note: Potentially valid only with bureau lineage, permissible-purpose checks and adverse-action mapping.

description: Synthetic debt-to-income ratio.
synthetic_bias_role: Higher values increase synthetic default risk.
production_credit_model_note: Potentially valid affordability input with source validation.

description: Requested synthetic loan amount.
synthetic_bias_role: Generated independently from income and purpose.
production_credit_model_note: Use with affordability controls; avoid encoding geography or protected status.

description: Requested loan term.
synthetic_bias_role: Sampled from common term buckets.
production_credit_model_note: Potentially valid input if product policy permits.

description: Synthetic purpose for the requested loan.
synthetic_bias_role: Categorical feature for reason-code demonstration.
production_credit_model_note: Review for disparate-impact proxy risk before production use.

description: Synthetic prior-default indicator.
synthetic_bias_role: Probability rises when synthetic credit score and debt burden worsen.
production_credit_model_note: Use only with accurate source data, recency policy and legal review.

description: Synthetic portfolio/geographic risk proxy.
synthetic_bias_role: Protected group has a mild upward shift to demonstrate proxy-bias monitoring.
production_credit_model_note: High-risk proxy; avoid or strictly validate before production scoring.

description: Synthetic target label for model training.
synthetic_bias_role: Generated from the synthetic risk equation.
production_credit_model_note: Training target only; production needs validated repayment outcome lineage.

description: Trained logistic-regression predicted probability of default.
synthetic_bias_role: Generated after fitting the model with predict_proba.
production_credit_model_note: Model output; audit and monitor, not an independent input.

description: Approval flag derived from model_score and the internal threshold.
synthetic_bias_role: Score below approval threshold is approved in the prototype.
production_credit_model_note: Decision-support output only; production requires policy and human-control design.

description: Borderline score-band flag for human review.
synthetic_bias_role: Derived from the internal manual-review score band.
production_credit_model_note: Operational routing output; production needs reviewer workflow and SLA controls.

description: Top mapped adverse-action reason for rejected applications.
synthetic_bias_role: Generated from model-aligned risk factors.
production_credit_model_note: Consumer-facing reason candidate; legal review required.

description: Second mapped adverse-action reason for rejected applications.
synthetic_bias_role: Generated from model-aligned risk factors.
production_credit_model_note: Consumer-facing reason candidate; legal review required.
